title: Republic Day Poster Making Competition
description:
Celebrate the spirit of constitutional India with creativity! On the eve of India’s Republic Day, the ISTE Student Chapter CEAL is organizing an online Republic Day Poster Making Competition.

This is your canvas to express patriotism, honor our heritage, and showcase your artistic vision. Dust off your brushes or fire up your digital design tools—let your creativity reflect the values that unite us as a nation!

🗓️ Event Details
Date of Event: January 25, 2026

Mode: Online Submission

Registration Fee: FREE

Grand Prize: Cash prizes worth ₹150+ up for grabs!
